title: adonis annua var. castellana
intro: Adonis annua var. castellana, also known as the Castilian Adonis or false hound's tongue, is a flowering plant species in the genus Adonis. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Adonis annua var. castellana include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as acne and eczema, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wound healing and reducing fever. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote healing and soothe the skin.
